judge_verdict.reasoning: Only two tools produced results: history_search and text_reasoning. Both are consistent in their findings. The history_search retrieved 4 records all from 2026-02-09 documenting a high-energy cycling accident with right upper extremity trauma, two AI reports (one focused on hand/wrist at 20% confidence, one on humerus shaft fracture at 85% confidence), both approved by Dr. House. The text_reasoning tool correctly synthesized this history, noted the absence of new labs or imaging data, and recommended obtaining/reviewing the X-ray results and complete medical history. There is no clinical disagreement between the tools — both identify the same injury event, the same prior reports, and the same gaps in data. The synthesis is also fully aligned. The text_reasoning confidence of 0.60 is at the threshold but is appropriate given the broad nature of the query ('review labs and imaging history') and the limited data available. No contradictions exist between the tool outputs.
